title: psydrax gynochthodes
intro: Psydrax gynochthodes, also known as the "Forest Blue" or "Blue Forest," is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is native to Australia and New Guinea, and its leaves are used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The leaves of Psydrax gynochthodes have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, colds, and digestive issues, due to their anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The leaves can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or made into a tincture or capsule for use in herbal medicine.
